problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
